Name: Aestari
Secondary Vision Traits:
Umbravision
Your eyes, reflecting the dim glow of the city’s skyline, grant you Umbravision up to 60 feet. You perceive the world in shades of gray, but in the right light, your eyes gleam with an unnatural radiance.
Lifespan Average:
Aestari mature slowly, reaching adulthood around a century of age. They can live beyond seven centuries, though few do.

Their longevity is not a blessing. It is exposure.

They remember mistakes long after the world has moved on.

They do not sleep. Instead, they enter a four-hour trance, remaining conscious while their bodies rest. During trance, they often drift along the shallow edges of the Dreamscape but rarely descend.

Name: Ithilari
Lifespan Average: Ithilari mature around 50 years and may live several centuries.

Name: Zhimeus
Lifespan Average: Zhimeus mature at a similar pace to Aestari, reaching adulthood around 80 years of age. Their lifespan is long but unstable, typically 500–700 years, though many succumb earlier due to alchemical exposure, planar degradation, or internal entropy imbalance.

Name: Vaelari
Lifespan Average: Vaelari mature at a pace similar to humans but often live up to 120 years, though intense psychic strain can shorten or unpredictably extend their lifespan.

Name: Eidolons
Lifespan Average: 500+ years

Name: Delvani
Secondary Vision Traits: You do not have Darkvision, as humanity’s origins are tied to the daylight, not the dark.
Lifespan Average: Delvani reach adulthood in their late 20s and can live up to 120 years. Elders are revered as structural memory for the community.

Name: Brannholt
Secondary Vision Traits: You do not have Darkvision, as humanity’s origins are tied to the daylight, not the dark.
Lifespan Average: Delvani reach adulthood in their late 20s and can live up to 120 years. Elders are revered as structural memory for the community.

Name: Cindralis
Lifespan Average: Cindralis reach adulthood **slowly**, typically around **30**, and live up to **150 years**.

Name: Varnhallan
Lifespan Average: Varnhallians reach adulthood by 20 and often live up to 120 years.

Name: Humans
Lifespan Average: Humans reach adulthood in their late teens and rarely live beyond 90 years. Their short lives drive urgency, ambition, and risk-taking uncommon among longer-lived species.

Name: Brasselan
Lifespan Average: Adult

Name: Emrelan
Lifespan Average: Adult

Name: Umbranauts
Lifespan Average: Umbranauts mature at a similar rate to Humans and commonly live between 120 and 160 years.

Name: Korrak
Secondary Vision Traits: Your industrial-honed senses grant you **Darkvision** up to **60 feet**. You can see in dim light and darkness **as if it were bright light**, but only in **shades of dull red and gray**.
Lifespan Average: Korrak reach adulthood by 15 and rarely live beyond 70 years, their harsh lives claiming many long before age does.

Name: Pykari
Secondary Vision Traits: Your connection to the **Ashen Spiral** grants you **Darkvision up to 60 feet**. You see the world in **shades of deep red and orange**, as if embers still smolder in the shadows.
Lifespan Average: Pykari mature quickly, reaching adulthood by **15 years old**, but they live long for their size—**often surpassing 180 years**. Elders say the fire within them burns slow but never fully fades.

Name: Vorraki
Secondary Vision Traits:
You can see in dim light within 60 feet
as if it were bright light, and in
darkness as if it were dim light.
Lifespan Average:
Vorraki reach maturity at 16 and live up
to 80 years, though many die young in the
brutal world of Concord City.

Name: Dren
Secondary Vision Traits: Your embered eyes grant you **Darkvision up to 60 feet**.
Lifespan Average: Dren age slowly. Many live beyond 300 years, remaining physically capable long after other species would falter.

Name: Vok
Lifespan Average: Vok mature around 25 and can live 200–300 years, though many choose to work until their bodies finally fail.

Name: Lysorian
Lifespan Average: Lysorians mature at a human rate but often live 140 to 180 years, with elders remaining lucid until late life.

Name: Kerevahn
Lifespan Average: Kerevahn do not age naturally. Some have existed for centuries unchanged, while others wither and fade as if unraveling from reality itself.
